zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria De Padilla於1334年出生在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞時，她的父親Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera52歲，母親María González de Henestrosa52歲。她於1353年與Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯布爾戈斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1351年被列為dama de isabel téllez de meneses mujer de juan alfonso de alburquerque。她去世於1361年7月14日在西班牙安達盧希亞卡迪斯梅迪納-希多尼亞享年27歲，埋葬在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria De Padilla于1334年出生在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞时，她的父亲Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera52岁，母亲María González de Henestrosa52岁。她于1353年与Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯布爾戈斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1351年被列为dama de isabel téllez de meneses mujer de juan alfonso de alburquerque。她去世于1361年7月14日在西班牙安達盧希亞卡迪斯梅迪納-希多尼亞享年27岁，埋葬在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Padilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Luis, Carlos, Jesus, Ramon, Pedro, Miguel, Ruben, Francisco, Jorge.

Spanish: habitational name from any of various minor places, for example in the provinces of Burgos, Guadalajara, and Valladolid, named from Spanish padilla ‘frying pan, breadpan’ (from Latin patella, a diminutive of patina ‘shallow dish’), a word that was commonly used in the topographic sense of a shallow, gentle depression. In the US, this surname is also found among Native Americans (mainly Pueblos).

variants.name: Padillo
meanings: Spanish: altered form of Padilla , with the male suffix -o for matching with the sex of the bearer of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria De Padilla was born in 1334, in Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain, her father, Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera, was 52 and her mother, María González de Henestrosa, was 52. She married Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon in 1353, in Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. In 1351, at the age of 17, her occupation is listed as dama de isabel téllez de meneses mujer de juan alfonso de alburquerque. She died on 14 July 1361, in Medina-Sidonia, Cádiz, Andalusia, Spain, at the age of 27, and was buried in Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria De Padilla est née en 1334, à Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne, son père, Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera, avait 52 ans et sa mère, María González de Henestrosa, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon en 1353, à Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. En 1351, à l’âge de 17 ans, la profession de sa indiquée est dama de isabel téllez de meneses mujer de juan alfonso de alburquerque. Elle est décédée le 14 juillet 1361, à Medina-Sidonia, Cádiz, Andalucía, Espagne, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria De Padilla 1334 in Sevilla, Andalucía, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera 52 und ihre Mutter María González de Henestrosa 52. Sie hat 1353 in Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1351, als sie 17 Jahre alt war, war ihr Beruf als dama de isabel téllez de meneses mujer de juan alfonso de alburquerque aufgeführt. Sie starb am 14. Juli 1361 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Medina-Sidonia, Cádiz, Andalucía, Spanien und wurde in Sevilla, Andalucía, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria De Padilla è nata il nel 1334 nel Sevilla, Andalucía, Spagna, sua padre, Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, María González de Henestrosa, aveva 52 anni. Lei sposato Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon nel 1353, nel Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Nel 1351, all'età di 17 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come dama de isabel téllez de meneses mujer de juan alfonso de alburquerque. Morì il 14 luglio 1361, nel Medina-Sidonia, Cádiz, Andalucía, Spagna, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolta a Sevilla, Andalucía, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria De Padillaが1334年にスペインアンダルクiアセヴィラで生まれた時，父Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villageraは52歳，母María González de Henestrosaは52歳であった。1353年にスペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスブルゴスでPedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1351年，17歳の時，職業はdama de isabel téllez de meneses mujer de juan alfonso de alburquerqueと記録されている。彼女は1361年7月14日にスペインアンダルクiアクaディズメディナ-シドニアで27歳で死去し，スペインアンダルクiアセヴィラにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria De Padilla(이)가 1334년 스페인 앤다루ci아 세비라에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 María González de Henestrosa(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 1353년 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 버고스 버고스에서 Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1351년, 17세의 나이로 그녀의 직업은 dama de isabel téllez de meneses mujer de juan alfonso de alburquerque이었다. 그녀는 1361년 7월 14일 스페인 앤다루ci아 ca디즈 메딘아-시도니아에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 앤다루ci아 세비라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria De Padilla nasceu em 1334, em Sevilla, Andaluzia, Espanha, seu pai, Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, María González de Henestrosa, tinha 52 anos. Ela casou-se com Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon em 1353, em Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Em 1351, com 17 anos, sua profissão aparece como dama de isabel téllez de meneses mujer de juan alfonso de alburquerque. Ela faleceu em 14 de julho de 1361, em Medina-Sidonia, Cádiz, Andaluzia, Espanha, com 27 anos, e foi sepultada em Sevilla, Andaluzia, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria De Padilla родилась в 1334 г. в местности севилла, андалукiа, Испания, её отцу по имени Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera было 52 года, а матери, которую звали María González de Henestrosa, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon в 1353 г. в местности бургос, бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1351 году, в возрасте 17 лет,  она работала по профессии dama de isabel téllez de meneses mujer de juan alfonso de alburquerque. Она умерла 14 июля 1361 г. в местности медина-сидоня, кaдиз, андалукiа, Испания в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности севилла, андалукiа, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria De Padilla nació en 1334, en Sevilla, Andalucía, España, su papá, Juan García de Padilla 1st Lord of Villagera, tenía 52 años y su mamá, María González de Henestrosa, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Pedro Alfonsez I King of Castile and Leon en 1353, en Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. En 1351, a la edad de 17 años, su ocupación registrada era dama de isabel téllez de meneses mujer de juan alfonso de alburquerque. Murió el 14 de julio de 1361, en Medina-Sidonia, Cádiz, Andalucía, España, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultada en Sevilla, Andalucía, España.
